testimonials.name: Anjali R.
testimonials.quote: From Munnar to Alleppey, every detail was perfect. The houseboat evening was magical!

testimonials.name: TechVerge HR
testimonials.quote: Handled 80 employees flawlessly. Bookings, transport, food — zero hiccups. Highly recommend.

testimonials.name: Suresh Menon
testimonials.quote: Took my parents to Ooty & Kodai. Comfortable cab, lovely hotels, super pricing.

testimonials.name: Devika S.
testimonials.quote: Safe, fun and within budget. Our class still talks about the Manali trip!

meta.siteTitle: Gokulam Holidays — Tour Packages Across India
meta.siteDescription: Premium tour packages from Palakkad & Thrissur, Kerala. Corporate, student, family & honeymoon trips across India and beyond.
meta.aboutMission: Make travel effortless, affordable and unforgettable for every Indian family and group.
meta.aboutVision: Be Kerala's most trusted tour partner — known for warmth, honesty and curated experiences.
meta.footerTagline: Crafting memorable journeys from Palakkad & Thrissur, Kerala — across India and beyond.
